summary: Reframed the opening around Della's arrival home to differentiate it from the adjacent room-first opening pattern and tightened the final line to hand off more cleanly into the Larkin hearing morning.
edits: Reordered the opening so the chapter enters on Della in the doorway with cemetery mud and the road already ahead of her, then returns to the marked hearth brick.
Adjusted the closing sentence to carry stove smoke and too little sleep directly into the next morning's hearing in Larkin.
